/collection/maya.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/maya.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: MAYA is still looking for a home! Its been 8 months now that she has been waiting for a home. This little patakha of ours is an absolute delight to have around. She is a super sweet girl who does great with other dogs and humans and is a speedster😍 she will make you play with her and complain if you don’t! She’ll do great in a family who already has a playful companion for her and a big space for her to run around and play. We are even open to farm/estate adoptions for her provided the family stays there. No caging/kenneling. Maya is 9 months old, vaccinated and sterilised.
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/collection/bacchan.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/bacchan.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: We are here again trying for a home for Bacchan. The sweetest and the naughtiest fellow of the pack seeks a home. Bacchan is 3 months old, super playful and is acing his toilet training😍 He is a smart fellow who knows his way around with other dogs and humans. His vaccinations and deworming are up to date amd he will need to be neutered once he grows up. He has to go to a home where there are other adult dogs who can teach him his trade!
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/collection/leo.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/leo.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Open to outstation adoptions within a day’s driving distance from Bangalore and we are open to farm adoptions where the family stays. Leo is just above a year old TRIPOD lab boy who was left on the streets to fend for himself when his owners left town. He was brought to us in a bad shape with atleast a 100 ticks. He recovered from everything very well and now is vaccinated and neutered. He is a typical lab energy and happy boy who loves pettings and his playtime. He is good with other dogs and humans. Being a tripod doesn’t hamper him in anyway and he can give you a run!! He is ready to go home now! A meat based diet is mandatory for him!
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/collection/jess.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/jess.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Beautiful girl JESS is looking for her forever home. She is the cutest golu molu kid who absolutely loves being pampered. She is a typical playful 3.5 months old pup who is currently in a foster home and needs her forever family! Jessica’s vaccination and deworming are up to date and her fosters say that she is the sweetest kid ever🥺 She loves being your lap dog and absolutely loves to play with other dogs and is good with cats too❤️ Webare looking for families who know that pups are a long term commitment and who understand the energy of a young pup and are willing to put in the time and efforts for this girl
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/collection/pebble.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/pebble.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Open to outstation adoptions within a day’s driving distance from Bangalore and adopters are requested to pitch in to the transportation costs. Pebble is a handsome 11 months old retriever boy who was given up by his family for reasons which have nothing to do with him. He is a typical retriever energy, super friendly with humans and other dogs. He will be well suited in an apartment/independent house with/without a dog. He only needs to be taught to walk well on leash and he is good to to. He is vaccinated and sterilised and a total cuddlebug❤️
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/collection/elsa.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/elsa.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Elsa is a super friendly, playful and a naughty girl who is looking for a home! She is about 2.5-3 years old, vaccinated and spayed! She is a super cheerful girl who just wants her food and playtime, loves her humans and other dogs! She would be well suited for a family with an active lifestyle as she is a ball of energy and if she can have an active playmate that would be a plus. Elsa will strictly need a meat based diet. Families with prior experience in handling high energy dogs will only be considered. Elsa suffers from separation anxiety because of her past so we would need the family to work on her with the help of our suggested trainer. We are open to outstation adoptions within a reasonable driving distance from Bangalore and major cities with good medical facilities. (Adopters are requested to bear the transportation costs)
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/collection/roadie.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/roadie.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Open to outstation adoptions/estate/farm adoption where the family stays. Adopters are requested to pitch in the transportation costs. Our boy ROADIE is looking for a home! He was ruthlessly abandoned near an isolated road with no means of food and water for 2 days in heavy rains. He is a super sweet gentle boy who spent days at our centre just waiting near the gate for his family. He was heartbroken and we really wish to send him home immediately! He is a gentle boy, very affectionate and would love to go to his forever! He gets playful and loves a good nap with his human! He is a Gsd indie mix big boy with a puppy heart❤️ Roadie is vaccinated, sterilised and just about 1.5-2 years old and will do equally well in an independent house/apartment. We are looking for people who would understand the heartbreak of abandonment and who would love him to bits.
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/Testing.title: Safescape Foundation
/Testing.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!

/collection/whisky.title: Safescape Foundation
/collection/whisky.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Whisky is here to steal your heart! ❤️ She is about 4-5 years old, vaccinated and sterilised girl who was found in the worst condition possible. Her lower body was burnt and had hot tar stuck to her entire body which burnt her skin. She recovered beautifully from her wounds and burns and now she is absolutely good and her hair is growing back. One of her front leg is deformed which is an old injury which was probably never treated but that doesn’t make her any less, she can walk on leash and run like every other dog. After going through so much of neglect and abuse, her spirit is not broken and she loves unconditionally. She is shy at first but becomes a cuddlebug when she knows you will give her food and hug her!🫶🏻 She is a calm kid as a single dog and playful if she has playmates! She will do equally well in an apartment and an independent house, with/without other dogs. She just needs to be taught to walk well on leash and she is good to go❤️ Meat based diet and supplements are mandatory for Whisky. We are open to adoption for her outstation to cities with good medical facilities.
These buddies looking for a forever home…
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

p: Open to outstation adoptions within a reasonable driving distance from Bangalore. KIA is here to win your hearts. She was given up by her family for reasons which had nothing to do with her. She is a goofy retriever girl, affectionate and wins over everyone within a blink. Kia is around 3 years old, vaccinated and neutered. She is great with humans and other dogs.
These buddies looking for a forever home…

/Privacy-Policy.title: Safescape Foundation
/Privacy-Policy.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

Safescape Foundation is committed to protecting the privacy of individuals who interact with our website, services, and programs. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
We collect personal information in various ways, including:
Fill out a pet surrender form
Apply to become a foster parent
Create an account on our website
Sign up for our newsletter or other communications
Automatically: We may collect information about your device and browsing activity when you visit our website, such as your IP address, browser type, and accessed pages.
The information we collect may include:
Personal information: Name, email address, phone number, mailing address, government-issued ID, payment information (for donations)
Demographic information: Age, location, household composition
Animal information: Species, breed, age, medical history, temperament (for surrendered or adopted animals)
Device and browsing activity data: IP address, browser type, pages accessed, cookies
We use your information for various purposes, including:
Process adoption applications and match pets with suitable homes
Follow up with adopters, foster parents, volunteers, and donors
Send you relevant updates and information about our work and events
Respond to your inquiries and requests
Verify information provided in applications and forms
Analyze website traffic and improve user experience
We will not share your personal information with third parties without your consent, except:
As required by law or legal process
To protect the safety of others
To investigate fraudulent or abusive activity

To service providers we engage to assist us with our operations, such as website hosting and payment processing (these providers will only be given access to the information necessary to perform their services and are obligated to keep your information confidential)
We take security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. These measures include:

We may use cookies and other tracking technologies to personalize your experience, improve our website, and analyze website traffic. You can control your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can also manage your subscription preferences for our communications.
Our website and services are not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the revised policy on our website.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

/Disclaimers.title: Safescape Foundation
/Disclaimers.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

Safescape Foundation is committed to providing transparency and responsibility in managing your contributions. This policy outlines how cancellations are handled and applies to various programs like adoptions, donations, and volunteering.
Prior to Approval: You can cancel your adoption application without incurring any fees before receiving approval. Simply inform us in writing (email or physical letter).

After Approval but Before Animal Placement: After receiving approval but before the animal is placed in your care, you can still cancel. While no refund will be issued for adoption fees, all contributions are treated as charitable donations under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. This means you may be eligible to claim tax deductions for them.
After Animal Placement: Once the animal is placed in your care, cancellations are generally not possible due to our commitment to their long-term well-being.

Recurring Donations: You can cancel your recurring donation at any time by logging into your online account or contacting us. Cancellations will take effect at the end of the current billing cycle. Since these contributions serve our charitable cause, they are treated as donations under Section 80G and may be eligible for tax deductions.

One-Time Donations: Once a one-time donation is processed, it cannot be cancelled or refunded. However, as with recurring donations, these contributions qualify as Section 80G donations and can potentially be claimed as tax deductions.
You can withdraw your volunteer application at any time before participating in any activities. No fees will be incurred.

If you already participate in volunteer activities and wish to cancel your involvement, kindly inform us in writing at least two weeks in advance. This allows us to adjust our scheduling and ensure smooth operations.
All cancellation requests must be made in writing (email or physical letter) within 30 days of the event triggering the cancellation request.
Shipping is not applicable to our organisation.

/Terms-and-Conditions.title: Safescape Foundation
/Terms-and-Conditions.description: Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love. Welcome to Safescape Foundation!
p: Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

Welcome to Safescape Foundation! This page outlines the terms and conditions that govern your use of our website and services, including pet adoption, surrender, fostering, volunteering, making donations, and creating an account (if applicable). By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
We collect personal information such as name, email address, phone number, and government-issued ID when you:
Fill out a pet surrender form
Apply to become a foster parent
Create an account on our website
We may also collect demographic information such as your age, location, and household composition.
Process adoption applications and match pets with suitable homes
Follow up with adopters, foster parents, volunteers, and donors
Send you relevant updates and information about our work and events
Respond to your inquiries and requests
Verify information provided in applications and forms
We will not share your personal information with third parties without your consent, except:
As required by law or legal process
To protect the safety of others
To investigate fraudulent or abusive activity
We do not currently allow user-generated content (UGC) such as photos or reviews.
We do not offer paid services or subscriptions. However, we accept voluntary donations to support our animal welfare work.
Please carefully review and understand the following important information before submitting your adoption application:

Matching Process: Safescape Foundation takes a deliberate approach to pet placement, prioritizing the long-term well-being of both the animal and the adopter. While applications are processed promptly, the best match for each animal isn't necessarily determined on a first-come, first-served basis. Our dedicated team carefully assesses each application considering the animal's needs, personality, and your household suitability to ensure a successful and lasting bond.

Financial Responsibility: As a loving pet owner, you'll be responsible for providing all necessary care for your adopted animal, including veterinary costs, food, and other essential supplies. We encourage you to carefully consider your financial commitment before applying.

Re-homing Procedures: While we hope every adoption is permanent, unforeseen circumstances may sometimes necessitate re-homing. Should you ever need to re-home your adopted animal, Safescape Foundation requests that you contact us first. We'll work with you to find the most suitable and responsible solution for both your pet and their future family.

Information Accuracy: All information provided in your adoption application, including references and household details, will be subject to verification. Providing accurate and complete information ensures a smooth and transparent adoption process.
By submitting your adoption application, you acknowledge and agree to the following:
You certify that the information provided in your application is accurate and truthful. Any misrepresentation may result in the denial of your application or revocation of adoption privileges.
You understand that Safescape Foundation reserves the right to deny adoption requests based on our assessment of the suitability match for both the animal and your situation.
You authorize us to verify all information provided in your application through references and other means.
Completing the pet surrender form signifies your formal request for Safescape Foundation to take custody of your animal. Please thoroughly review and understand the following terms before proceeding:

Ownership Transfer: Upon submission of this form, you irrevocably relinquish all legal rights of ownership and authority over your pet to Safescape Foundation. This includes any future claims or involvement in the animal's life.

No Further Updates: While we strive to provide the best possible care for all animals in our shelter, we may not be able to offer regular updates or detailed information about your pet's individual status or well-being.

Adoption at Safescape's Discretion: All surrendered animals become eligible for adoption through Safescape Foundation's adoption process. The final decision regarding placement in a loving home rests with our experienced team, and further involvement from the previous owner is not permitted.
By completing and submitting the pet surrender form, you confirm your understanding and acceptance of the above terms. This agreement is legally binding.
By expressing your interest in becoming a foster parent, please take note of the following important information:
Animal Needs: Foster animals often require additional care and attention beyond those of healthy pets. This may include:
Medical treatment: Some animals may be recovering from illnesses or injuries, requiring medication administration, wound care, or other ongoing medical support.

Behavioral training: Certain animals may have behavioral challenges or anxieties that need gentle guidance and positive reinforcement training. We will provide resources and support to help you navigate these situations.

Socialization: Some animals may require gradual introduction to other pets or children in your household to ensure a harmonious environment. We will offer guidance and supervision during this process.
Dietary requirements: Specific dietary needs, allergies, or feeding schedules may need to be followed for certain animals.

Temporary Commitment: Fostering is a temporary arrangement, with the ultimate goal of finding a permanent home for the animal. The duration of your foster period will depend on the individual animal's needs and the adoption process, but we will keep you informed throughout.

Financial Responsibility: While Safescape Foundation covers the primary medical expenses for foster animals, some incidental costs like specific diet foods, toys, or treats may require your contribution. We will discuss cost expectations with you during the matching process.

Communication and Reporting: Regularly communicating with the Safescape Foundation team is crucial. This includes updates on the animal's well-being, any significant behavioral changes, adherence to medication schedules, and reporting any potential health concerns. We encourage open communication and will be available to answer questions and offer support throughout the fostering journey.

Compassion and Patience: Fostering animals can be both rewarding and challenging. Understanding and embracing the animal's individual needs with patience and compassion is key to creating a positive and nurturing temporary home.
By submitting your Foster application, you acknowledge and agree to the following:
You will provide a safe and loving temporary home for the foster animal, meeting their basic needs and ensuring their well-being, including following any specific care instructions provided.
You understand that decisions regarding adoption and the duration of the fostering period rest with Safescape Foundation based on the animal's best interests.

You will contribute to the animal's well-being by following the care instructions provided, including administering prescribed medication, attending scheduled veterinary appointments, and implementing any recommended training or socialization strategies.
You will maintain open communication with Safescape Foundation, keeping them informed of the animal's progress, any potential concerns, and your availability for future fostering opportunities.
By expressing your interest in volunteering with Safescape Foundation, you acknowledge and agree to the following:

Commitment and Reliability: Volunteering requires dedication and consistent attendance. We kindly request that you only express interest if you're confident in fulfilling your time commitment to our cause. We offer various volunteer opportunities with flexible scheduling options, so please choose a commitment level that aligns with your availability.

Animal Handling: Our animals may have diverse backgrounds and temperaments. Volunteers will be required to participate in training sessions and follow safety protocols when interacting with the animals. This may involve leash walking, playing, feeding, assisting with cleaning, and providing basic care. We will offer comprehensive training to ensure your safety and confidence while interacting with the animals.

Confidentiality: All information about our animals, their care, and our operations must be treated with utmost confidentiality. Discussing confidential information outside of designated channels is strictly prohibited. This includes information about animals' personalities, medical conditions, adoption information, and internal operations.

Respectful Conduct: We uphold a positive and supportive environment for all volunteers, staff, and animals. Any form of discrimination, harassment, or harmful behavior will not be tolerated and may result in immediate termination of volunteer activities. This includes treating all animals and people with kindness, respect, and understanding.

Following Instructions: Volunteers are expected to follow instructions provided by staff members regarding animal care, cleaning procedures, safety protocols, and other tasks. This ensures the smooth functioning of the shelter and the well-being of the animals.

Open Communication: If you have any concerns, questions, or feedback regarding your volunteer experience, please communicate openly with our volunteer coordinator or relevant staff members. We value your input and strive to create a positive and fulfilling volunteer experience for everyone.
Volunteer opportunities may vary depending on available positions and your skills and interests.
Some roles may require specific skills or experience, such as dog walking, cat socializing, or administrative tasks.
We encourage all volunteers to attend regular volunteer meetings and training sessions to stay updated on procedures and animal care best practices.

By volunteering with Safescape Foundation, you contribute significantly to the well-being of animals in need and gain valuable experience working with a dedicated team. We appreciate your commitment to our cause and look forward to welcoming you as part of our volunteer community.
By making a donation to Safescape Foundation, you acknowledge and agree to the following:

Use of Donations: All donations received will be used exclusively for the charitable purposes and programs outlined on our website and in our promotional materials. This includes the care and well-being of animals, adoption and fostering initiatives, animal welfare advocacy, and operational expenses necessary to support our mission.

Tax Deductibility: Donations made to Safescape Foundation are eligible for tax deductions under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act, 1961. We provide official donation receipts for tax purposes. Please consult with your tax advisor for specific information regarding claiming deductions.

Third-Party Processing: We may utilize secure third-party payment processors to facilitate online donations. These platforms have industry-standard security measures in place to protect your financial information. You agree to abide by the terms and conditions of these platforms when making online donations.
Donation Recognition: We may publicly acknowledge your generous contribution at our discretion, unless you request anonymity. Please inform us if you prefer your donation to remain anonymous.

No Refunds: Due to the nature of our charitable work and immediate allocation of funds towards animal welfare initiatives, refunds for donations are not possible. Please consider your donation carefully before making a contribution.

Changes to Policy: We reserve the right to modify this Donations section at any time. We will make reasonable efforts to notify you of any changes through our website or other communication channels. Your continued use of our website and donation services after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised policy.

By donating to Safescape Foundation, you become a valuable partner in our mission to create a safe and loving haven for animals in need. We sincerely appreciate your generosity and commitment to our cause.

/Adopt-a-Buddy.description: Wish to adopt a buddy from Safescape Foundation? Apply here.
p: Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.

/.title: Safescape Foundation
/.description: Safescape provides tailored care, from warm bellies to healthy fur, ensuring every paw finds its perfect path.
p: Sponsor a pet for this month
What can you do with us?

Every abandoned paw prints a story of longing, every whimper a plea for safe haven. Safescape Foundation, since 2019, has been the answer to that silent plea, a lighthouse guiding lost souls to shores of security and love.

We don't offer mere shelter, we orchestrate escapes – from fear to trust, from loneliness to belonging. Here, furry hearts rediscover the melody of joy, painting futures where every wag echoes with the promise of forever families.
Join us, become a chorus of welcome, and paint a world where every dog finally dances, Safescape etched in every joyful leap.
Copyright © 2026 Safescape Foundation. All Rights Reserved.
